---
name: 🚀 Feature Proposer
about: Suggest a structural enhancement or a new language-specific reference adapter
title: '[FEAT]: '
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the limitation is (e.g., "I'm frustrated because we lack a standardized public gRPC controller boilerplate for inter-monolith migration paths.")

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe the structural solution you'd like to see implemented. Be specific about which Rings and Layers are modified.

## 📐 Layer Impact
Detail how this feature adheres to our strict boundary guidelines:
* Does this change affect any `*/pure/` package? [Yes/No]
* What new third-party dependencies are introduced to the `*/public/` layer, if any?

## 📝 Additional Alternatives Considered
Any alternative designs or workarounds you have evaluated.
